[[Agent/Legends|Agent]] '''Shofeld''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Zhir-Khan]] assigned Shofeld to observe fugitive [[Zayl Braith]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] until she left the planet.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
